title: Soartex Forever - Fresh Animations
description: Soartex Forever compatibility pack for Fresh Animations by FreshLX
body:
![Soartex Forever X Fresh Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/280039ce73ca604604e42c0d5221f8c61fd19ceb_0.webp)

![Notice "Important"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/146e074dcee73421c7b94f19c32a9aef377c2cbd.png)

<center>

This is an **addon pack** for **Soartex Forever** to add compatability for Fresh Animations. This pack was created with permission from FreshLX and follows FA's Terms & Conditions.

**Load Order: Soartex Forever -> Fresh Animations -> (This Pack)**
</center>



![Notice "required"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16b4cd8989cecf9f8e31647795be4a3cd38c77b5.png)

<details>
  <summary>⚙️ Required Mods</summary>

  The mods "[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)" or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), and [ESF](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf) by Traben are all **REQUIRED** as this pack contains features that require them to work properly. 
  
</details>


<details>
  <summary>📦 Required Resource Packs</summary>

The Resource packs [Soartex Forever](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soartexforever) & [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) are also required.

</details>

![Animated Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a01f785180fe9dd583b32935e5cd7b71adeaeb3.png)
